display.purpose: Hero headings only. One per page. The loudest element in the system.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Bold but a clear step down from display.

title.purpose: Project titles, timeline roles, contact heading.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and descriptions. Generous line-height for dark backgrounds.

label.purpose: Section markers, nav links, dates, tag text. The system's metadata voice.

shadows.name: beacon-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold halo on primary CTA hover. The only 'shadow' in the system.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Cyan glow for accent-highlighted interactive elements.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for hover/focus color and border transitions.

motion.name: drift-slow
motion.purpose: Ambient glow drift. Slow, organic, never jarring.

motion.name: drift-slower
motion.purpose: Secondary ambient glow. Offset timing from primary.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold CTA. The only warm element on any screen. Used sparingly — one or two per page.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Download Resume <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M3 8.5h10M9 4.5l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; background: oklch(78% 0.14 85); color: oklch(8% 0.015 230); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9375rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 oklch(78% 0.14 85 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(83% 0.14 85); box-shadow: 0 0 30px 0 oklch(78% 0.14 85 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(78% 0.14 85); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Border-only, no fill. Quieter than primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); color: oklch(72% 0.01 230); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(52% 0.01 230); color: oklch(93% 0.01 230); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.15 220); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Inline Link
components.description: Monospace link with arrow. Used for project links and 'view more' actions.
components.html: View on GitHub
components.css: .ds-link-inline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(75% 0.15 220); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-link-inline:hover { color: oklch(93% 0.01 230); } .ds-link-inline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.15 220); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-link-inline svg { width: 0.875rem; height: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Compact monospace tag for skills and technologies.
components.css: .ds-skill-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.375rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); border-radius: 4px; color: oklch(72% 0.01 230); background: oklch(12% 0.012 230); transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; }

components.name: Skill Tag Accent
components.css: .ds-skill-tag-accent { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.375rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(75% 0.15 220 / 0.3); border-radius: 4px; color: oklch(75% 0.15 220); background: oklch(12% 0.012 230); transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top nav with backdrop blur. Logo left, links right.
components.html:
hyprnx
AboutProjectsExperienceContact
components.css: .ds-nav { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; background: oklch(8% 0.015 230 / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; color: oklch(75% 0.15 220); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(72% 0.01 230); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(93% 0.01 230); }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact data readout. Monospace number in cyan, muted label below.
components.html:
5+
Years building data pipelines
components.css: .ds-stat { padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(12% 0.012 230); } .ds-stat-number { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(75% 0.15 220); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(52% 0.01 230); line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Full-width featured project with meta, highlights, tags, and link.
components.html:
Vietnamese Used Cars Dataset

Open-source dataset and prediction model for the Vietnamese automotive market. Ranked 4th in Kaggle competition.

View on GitHub
PythonSklearnKaggle
components.css: .ds-project { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; padding: 3rem; border: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(12% 0.012 230); align-items: start; } .ds-project-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(93% 0.01 230); margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-project-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(72% 0.01 230); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; max-width: 50ch; } .ds-project-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-project-tag { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(22% 0.015 230); border-radius: 3px; color: oklch(52% 0.01 230); }

narrative.overview:
Something transmitting from far away that rewards those who tune in. The origin is mysterious; the message is clear; the presence is unmistakable. This system treats the portfolio not as a document but as a transmission: a signal broadcast from a mind that builds infrastructure at scale and thinks in futures.

The visual language is dark, atmospheric, and deliberately restrained. Depth comes from tonal layering and ambient light, not from stacked shadows or busy decoration. Every surface sits in a void-like space where subtle cyan glows drift like distant nebulae, and a single warm gold frequency cuts through as the call to action. The effect is cinematic without being theatrical.

This system explicitly rejects: generic AI-generated portfolio templates, static lifeless backgrounds, Bootstrap resume layouts, particle effects as decoration, corporate SaaS hero-metric grids, and the 'developer dark mode with neon green' reflex.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-frequency color: cool cyan signal + warm gold beacon
Bold type at display scale, restrained everywhere else

rules.name: The Dual Frequency Rule
rules.body: Cyan is information. Gold is action. These two hues never swap roles, never blend into each other, and never appear on the same element.

rules.name: The Tinted Void Rule
rules.body: No pure black (#000) and no pure white (#fff) anywhere in the system. Every neutral carries a trace of hue 230.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter speaks in sentences. JetBrains Mono speaks in labels. Never use Inter for metadata. Never use JetBrains Mono for paragraphs.

rules.name: The Steep Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Display is 4-8x the size of Label. The scale jumps are dramatic and intentional.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited. Depth comes from tonal steps. The only 'shadows' are colored glow halos on interactive elements.

rules.name: The Living Void Rule
rules.body: The background is never static. Ambient glows drift on slow easing curves. Grid lines fade via radial mask. Scanlines add CRT texture.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color definitions.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 230.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all metadata: nav links, section labels, dates, tags, stat numbers.
Do keep ambient background layers at fixed position with pointer-events: none.
Do use the gold CTA sparingly — one or two per page.
Do let content breathe. Section padding is 7rem. Paragraphs max at 60ch.
donts: Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff).
Don't use generic AI-generated portfolio templates.
Don't use Bootstrap or template-kit resume layouts.
Don't use particle effects as decoration.
Don't use hero-metric grids with big numbers and gradient accents.
Don't default to developer dark mode with neon green on black.
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't swap cyan and gold roles.
